title: Income Tax Return Filing Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Expert income tax return filing in Mumbai. Individual, business, company, NRI ITR. Capital gains, property income. Call +91-77000 89597.
bodyText:
Looking for income tax return filing in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor provides complete ITR filing services in Mumbai, led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA). We handle all return types for individuals, businesses, companies, and NRIs with accurate tax computation and maximum legitimate deductions.

What is Income Tax Return Filing Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  ITR preparation and filing — ITR-1 (salaried), ITR-2 (capital gains/multiple properties), ITR-3 (business/profession), ITR-4 (presumptive), ITR-5 (firms/LLPs), ITR-6 (companies). Capital gains computation — shares, mutual funds, real estate with correct indexation, Section 54/54EC/54F exemptions, and LTCG grandfathering provisions. Rental income computation with municipal tax deduction and Section 24(b) interest claim. NRI return filing — DTAA benefits, NRO interest taxation, property sale TDS refund claims, and foreign tax credit. AIS/TIS reconciliation to ensure complete income disclosure and avoid scrutiny. Advance tax and self-assessment tax computation.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for ITR Filing in Mumbai
  Mumbai taxpayers often have complex income profiles — multiple property income, significant share market activity, business income with Section 44AD/44ADA, and NRI-related taxation. Incorrect returns lead to Section 143(1) intimations, defective return notices, or scrutiny selection. CA V. Viswanathan handles complex returns with proper AIS reconciliation — ensuring every income source reported by banks, brokers, and registrars is correctly disclosed and taxed. Our Goregaon West office provides in-person tax consultation.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Document and AIS/TIS collection with income source identification. Step 2: Income computation across all heads — salary, property, capital gains, business, other sources. Step 3: Deduction optimisation and regime comparison. Step 4: Return preparation with CA review. Step 5: E-filing and verification. Step 6: Post-filing — intimation review, refund tracking, rectification if needed.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need ITR filing in Mumbai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062
  Quick turnaround. Accurate filing. CA-certified.

faqs.q: What is the penalty for late ITR filing?
faqs.a: Late filing fee of Rs 5,000 under Section 234F (Rs 1,000 if total income is below Rs 5 lakhs). Additionally, interest under Section 234A at 1% per month on unpaid tax. Loss carry-forward (except house property loss) is also forfeited if return is filed late.

faqs.q: Do you handle high-value ITR with multiple capital gains?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle returns with hundreds of equity/MF transactions, real estate capital gains with multiple properties, and unlisted share transfers. We reconcile broker statements, compute holding periods, and apply correct tax rates for each category.

faqs.q: Can you help with ITR for Mumbai-based NRIs?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle NRI ITR filing including rental income from Mumbai property, capital gains on property sale, NRO/NRE interest taxation, DTAA benefit claims, and TDS refund applications under Section 195/197.
